creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text: Don't use PORTREVISION when the version of the port changes.  Change PORTVERSION to something like 0.9.2015.08.11, or the date of the last commit, but don't use PORTREVISION to for that. PORTREVISION is to use when the software does not change but the port changes. (Say, you add an option, change a default, strip a file.)
